title: Lazuli's Extras
description: Adds extras that fit in with vanilla Minecraft, including Lapis & Emerald tools/armor! (and more)
body:
This mod adds **extras** to Minecraft that fit in with Vanilla! As of currently, it features:

- Lapis Lazuli Armor/Tools
- Emerald Armor/Tools
- Armadillo Armor (only available on 1.21.1+)
- A recipe for Enchanted Golden Apples
- A recipe for Bottle O' Enchantings
- Villagers dropping 1-3 emeralds upon death, with zombie villagers having a chance to  drop one
- More emeralds dropping from emerald ore
- A new music disc, Dog by C418

with more on its way!

**Planned**

- Amethyst Armor/tools
- Full set of turtle armor
- Shulker armor
- Obsidian armor/tools
- Prismarine armor/tools (?)
- Enchanted golden carrots (?)

taking suggestions atm!!!

FYI I will not backport this mod before 1.19 for the time being
